source: Codex imagegen for art generation; non-creative chroma-key removal only for alpha layers
style: medium-saturation creamy moonlit fantasy, side-scrolling push-forward, no center focal area
generationRule: Do not use Python scripts to generate art. Scripts may only remove flat chroma-key backgrounds, inspect dimensions, inspect alpha, or validate naming/meta references.

baseline.rule: All player and monster foot/paw contact points must align to one horizontal Unity world baseline. Do not reuse old baselineY values from previous generated layers; set the final baseline during Unity placement.

layers.name: battle_scene_ground_loop.png
layers.role: transparent L4 playable combat ground strip

layers.name: battle_scene_foreground_grass_loop.png
layers.role: transparent L5 bottom foreground speed layer

notes: The new split layers were generated as separate imagegen assets rather than code-drawn art.
Sky and far hills are opaque base layers. Mid forest, ground, and foreground grass are alpha layers.
The old preview image may not represent this split accurately and should not be used as an approval reference.
Foreground grass is optional and should be disabled if it obscures drops, warnings, or foot contact points.
